mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wiki_lint_results ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM wiki_lint_results WHERE resolved = FALSE AND (ignored_until IS NULL OR ignored_until < NOW()) ORDER BY severity DESC, last_seen_at DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM wiki_lint_results WHERE severity = #{severity} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM wiki_lint_results WHERE page_id = #{pageId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_lint_results (lint_type, page_id, fingerprint, description, severity, resolved, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, ignored_until) VALUES (#{lintType}, #{pageId}, #{fingerprint}, #{description}, #{severity}, #{resolved}, #{firstSeenAt}, #{lastSeenAt}, #{ignoredUntil})

INSERT INTO wiki_lint_results (lint_type, page_id, fingerprint, description, severity, resolved, first_seen_at, last_seen_at, ignored_until) VALUES (#{lintType}, #{pageId}, #{fingerprint}, #{description}, #{severity}, FALSE, COALESCE(#{firstSeenAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{lastSeenAt}, NOW()), #{ignoredUntil}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description = VALUES(description), severity = VALUES(severity), resolved = FALSE, resolved_by = NULL, resolved_at = NULL, last_seen_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE wiki_lint_results SET resolved = TRUE, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wiki_lint_results WHERE resolved = TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wiki_lint_results WHERE resolved = FALSE AND (ignored_until IS NULL OR ignored_until < NOW())
